Created attachment 227492
patch

devel/vala-language-server - Language server for Vala and Genie

vala-language-server provides a language server for the Vala programming
language and Genie programming language. Installing this server allows for
editors to inspect and debug Vala projects.

WWW: https://github.com/Prince781/vala-language-server
